section.heading: Procurement of personnel

content.p: The Secretary may take such measures as the Secretary determines necessary in order to obtain recruits for the commissioned officer corps of the Administration, including advertising.

section.sourceCredit: (Pub. L. 107–372, title II, § 235, as added Pub. L. 116–259, title III, § 306(a), Dec. 23, 2020, 134 Stat. 1174.)
